name: Share Views
description: Share live network diagrams with others

description: 30 minute onboarding call to ensure you're getting the most out of Scanopy

description: Track all user actions and data changes for compliance and security

description: Push real-time events to external systems when hosts, services, or topology changes

name: Remove Watermark
description: Remove 'Created using scanopy.net' in bottom right corner of exported images

description: Programmatic access to your data in Scanopy via API

description: Use your own identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, etc.) for single sign-on

name: Managed Deployment
description: We deploy, configure, and manage Scanopy for you on a dedicated instance

description: We deploy Scanopy to a custom domain with your branding

name: Community Support
description: Community support via GitHub issues and discussions

name: Email Support
description: Access to the Scanopy team via email support tickets

name: Live Chat Support
description: Access to the Scanopy team via live chat

name: Priority Support
description: Prioritized email support with faster response times

name: Embeddable Diagrams
description: Embed live network diagrams in wikis, dashboards, or documentation

name: Network Discovery
description: Automatically discover hosts, services, and connections on your network

name: Topology Visualization
description: Interactive network topology maps with automatic layout

name: Diagram Export
description: Export network diagrams as high-resolution PNG or SVG images

name: Host Inventory
description: Searchable inventory of all discovered hosts and their details

name: Scheduled Discovery
description: Schedule automatic network discovery scans

name: No Port Forwarding

description: Auto-detect databases, containers, web servers, and more

name: SNMP Integration
description: Query network devices for hardware, port, and performance details via SNMP
